name: Cannabis
description: Cannabis and CBD products. Campaigns promoting cannabis products, dispensaries, or CBD brands.

regulatory_frameworks.name: US Federal/State Conflict
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Federally prohibited but legal in many states. Geo-restriction to legal jurisdictions required. No targeting of minors. State-specific advertising rules vary significantly.

guidance: Geo-restriction is critical — campaigns must be restricted to jurisdictions where cannabis is legal. The plan's regions field should specify legal states/provinces. Age-gating required in all jurisdictions.
